description: Two deterministic Stop-event safety nets (no LLM). overclaim-net: blocks once when the final assistant message claims a result (done/fixed/verified/passing/…) but no command ran this turn to back it. slnx-sync: blocks once when a .csproj on disk is not registered in the repo's .slnx — skips VMR-synced upstream forks (dotnet/dotnet codeflow / dotnet upstream remote) and honors a .slnx-sync-ignore opt-out file.
